data.title: Lethal Means Counseling for Military-Affiliated Women Must Be Evidence-Informed: New Research From Cohen Veterans Network Institute for Quality (CVN-IQ) Published in PLOS One
data.description: A recent systematic review, sponsored by Face the Fight®, examined military-affiliated women's perspectives on securely storing firearms for suicide prevention. Released by the Cohen Veterans Network Institute for Quality (CVN-IQ) in Stamford, Conn. on April 14, 2026, the study delved into literature to present key insights on this critical issue.

data.title: Century Complete Reveals New Homes Coming Soon to Hartwell, GA
data.description: Leading national homebuilding company Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) is introducing affordable newly constructed homes to the picturesque lakefront city of HARTWELL, Georgia. Renowned for their expertise in online home sales and recognized as one of America's Most Trustworthy companies, Century Communities aims to provide attractive housing options for residents in the area. This development signifies an important step in meeting the growing demand for quality housing in HARTWELL.

data.title: SEI Names Adam Hartstein as Managing Director of Chicago Office
data.description: Bringing with him over two decades of experience in strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and business transformation, seasoned consultant Adam Hartstein has joined SEI in Chicago on April 14, 2026. SEI, being a prominent employee-owned management consulting firm, aims to leverage Hartstein's expertise to drive growth in the region.

data.title: Nonwoven Fabrics Market Size to Reach $104.1 Billion by 2033 at 6.0% CAGR | Allied Market Research
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on April 14, 2026, a new report titled "Nonwoven Fabrics Market by Polymer Type, Function, Technology, and Application: Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast, 2024–2033" (Report Code: A13919) was released. The research study revealed that the global market for nonwoven fabrics is expected to experience significant growth over the forecast period from 2024 to 2033.

data.title: Global Undersea Warfare Systems Market Poised for Strong Growth as Rising Maritime Security Concerns and Technological Advancements Drive Demand: Verified Market Research®
data.description: There is a rising demand in the global undersea warfare systems market due to escalating geopolitical tensions, naval modernization programs, and the growing necessity for maritime domain awareness. This has led to a significant increase in the market for undersea warfare systems, with a focus on autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and sonar technologies. The market is experiencing accelerated growth with current estimates indicating a market value of approximately $15 billion, driven by the demand for advanced undersea warfare capabilities. This growth trend is expected to continue as countries invest in upgrading their naval defense systems to meet evolving threats in the undersea domain.

data.title: Mountain Temp Services Expands with New Boise, Idaho Branch
data.description: A staffing company, Mountain Temp Services, has recently opened a new branch in Boise, Idaho. This expansion aims to serve the growing demand for jobs in the area and establish the company as a reliable partner for staffing needs. The new branch will offer employment opportunities to local residents and contribute to the economic development of Boise.

data.title: Pavion Honored as Verkada's Impact Partner of the Year for Physical Security
data.description: Pavion, based in CHANTILLY, Va., announced on April 14, 2026, its focus on delivering cloud-native, AI-powered solutions to safeguard individuals and properties while enhancing threat response efficiency. As a top provider in fire, safety, security, and critical communications solutions, Pavion aims to offer advanced technology for protection.
